description_long: This object consists of a light-colored wooden pallet supporting three cardboard boxes. The pallet is constructed from unfinished wood planks, arranged with gaps between them and reinforced with perpendicular support beams underneath. The boxes are labeled with the word 'For' and various handling symbols, suggesting they are parcels intended for shipping or storage. Two boxes are placed side by side on the pallet, with a third box stacked on top, forming a stable arrangement. The cardboard boxes are light brown with printed black and gray text and symbols, and their surfaces appear smooth and slightly matte. The overall setup is typical for logistics, warehousing, or delivery scenarios in urban environments.
description: A light wooden pallet holds three labeled cardboard parcels, two on the bottom and one stacked on top, with clear shipping symbols and a clean, organized appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three boxes, with two on the pallet and one stacked on top, clearly displaying the 'For' label and shipping symbols.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the pallet and the side profiles of the boxes, with only the two lower boxes visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the arrangement of the boxes and the structure of the pallet, but with less visible labeling.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the side profiles of the boxes and the wooden slats of the pallet, with minimal labeling visible.
